parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: '补录任务已启动，将在后台获取并处理文章' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ items: $json.items, config: { batch_size: 3, initial_delay: 15, max_retries: 3, poll_interval: 10, poll_timeout: 300, notify_webhook: 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/notify', notify_room: 'daily' } }) }}
